query:
ALTER TABLE remediation_verifications 
  ADD COLUMN rv_severity ENUM('critical','high','medium','low','info') DEFAULT 'medium',
  ADD COLUMN rv_sla_deadline TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN rv_sla_hours INT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN rv_verification_output TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN rv_attempt_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN rv_asset_name VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN rv_finding_title VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL;
